payload.description:
## Summary
Feedback-backed evaluations can currently be marked complete even when a usable RCA payload is absent or never persisted.

## Symptom
A feedback-backed evaluation may complete without usable `root_cause` output even when incorrect items exist.

## Impact
This is a process-critical reliability defect because RCA is required to make evaluation results actionable in the optimization loop.
payload.title: Feedback-backed evaluations can complete without usable RCA payload
